name: axolotl-agent-skill
description: Expert guidance for fine-tuning LLMs with Axolotl - YAML configs, 100+ models, LoRA/QLoRA, DPO/KTO/ORPO/GRPO, multimodal support
intent_triggers: 我需要處理 axolotl 相關工作
幫我啟用 axolotl 這個 skill
用 agent skill 完成 axolotl

task.description: Natural-language task or instruction for the agent skill.

context_path.description: Optional workspace path or file context for the skill.

examples.intent: Use the axolotl skill for this task.

error_codes.1: Skill invocation failed or required context was missing.
